MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Brian C. Johnson, Esq., Seven Hills LLP (415) 926-7247 brian@ sevenhillsllp.com Attorney for Plaintiff KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL
BAILEE B. PELHAM, Esq., BUCHALTER A Professional Corporation 949.760.1121 bpelham@buchalter.com Attorneys for Defendant EDDIE MARINE, INC., Attorney for Defendant
EDDIE MARINE, INC.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDDIE MARINE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendant's motion to strike is denied. This motion is based on the argument that the statute of limitations bars plaintiff's claim. As explained in the companion order overruling defendant's demurrer, neither the complaint nor the notices of violation demonstrate that the claim is time barred.

Counsel for the Plainitff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Brian C. Johnson, Esq., Seven Hills LLP (415) 926-7247 brian@ sevenhillsllp.com Attorney for Plaintiff KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL
BAILEE B. PELHAM, Esq., BUCHALTER A Professional Corporation 949.760.1121 bpelham@buchalter.com Attorneys for Defendant EDDIE MARINE, INC., Attorney for Defendant
EDDIE MARINE, INC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDDIE MARINE, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant's demurrer to complaint is overruled. The court grants the parties' unopposed requests for judicial notice. The court does not consider the Johnson declaration.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the Plainitff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
